{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager (Beauty / Cosmetics Brand)",
  "description": "Kuddy Cosmetics exemplifies sustainable, homegrown success in Nigeria&rsquo;s beauty sector&mdash;rising from a suitcase startup to a national brand with a loyal following, original product lines, extensive retail outlets, and digital innovation. Kudirat Fashola&rsquo;s journey reflects tenacity, entrepreneurial ingenuity, and a vision that continues to shape Africa&rsquo;s cosmetics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Beauty / Cosmetics Brand)

Job Location:&nbsp;Tradefair / Amuwo, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Description


	Are you a highly organized and results-driven professional with a passion for beauty and retail? We are looking for a Project Manager to oversee and coordinate key projects across our beauty brand, ensuring timely execution and business growth.


Job Summary


	The Project Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, and supervising projects across marketing, store operations, product launches, and brand campaigns.
	This role requires strong leadership, coordination, and problem-solving skills to ensure all projects are delivered on time and within scope.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, manage, and execute brand and retail projects from start to finish
	Coordinate with internal teams (sales, marketing, social media, and store staff)
	Oversee product launches, promotions, and in-store activations
	Develop project timelines, budgets, and deliverables
	Monitor project progress and ensure deadlines are met
	Identify risks and provide solutions proactively
	Track performance and report on project outcomes
	Ensure brand consistency across all projects.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in project management (retail or beauty industry is an advantage)
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and leadership abilities
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficiency in project management tools and Microsoft Office
	Strong attention to detail.


Key Skills:


	Project planning &amp; execution
	Time management
	Team coordination
	Problem-solving
	Communication &amp; reporting
	Leadership


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@kuddycosmetics.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Project Manager (Beauty / Cosmetics Brand) Job at Kuddy Cosmetics




        
    

        
        Kuddy Cosmetics exemplifies sustainable, homegrown success in Nigeria’s beauty sector—rising from a suitcase startup to a national brand with a loyal following, original product lines, extensive retail outlets, and digital innovation. Kudirat Fashola’s journey reflects tenacity, entrepreneurial ingenuity, and a vision that continues to shape Africa’s cosmetics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Beauty / Cosmetics Brand)

Job Location: Tradefair / Amuwo, Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you a highly organized and results-driven professional with a passion for beauty and retail? We are looking for a Project Manager to oversee and coordinate key projects across our beauty brand, ensuring timely execution and business growth.


Job Summary


	The Project Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, and supervising projects across marketing, store operations, product launches, and brand campaigns.
	This role requires strong leadership, coordination, and problem-solving skills to ensure all projects are delivered on time and within scope.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, manage, and execute brand and retail projects from start to finish
	Coordinate with internal teams (sales, marketing, social media, and store staff)
	Oversee product launches, promotions, and in-store activations
	Develop project timelines, budgets, and deliverables
	Monitor project progress and ensure deadlines are met
	Identify risks and provide solutions proactively
	Track performance and report on project outcomes
	Ensure brand consistency across all projects.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field
	2–5 years of experience in project management (retail or beauty industry is an advantage)
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and leadership abilities
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
	Proficiency in project management tools and Microsoft Office
	Strong attention to detail.


Key Skills:


	Project planning & execution
	Time management
	Team coordination
	Problem-solving
	Communication & reporting
	Leadership


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Clean Ace Dry &nbsp;Cleaners and Launderers Limited is a certified Dry cleaning company, with mission ofdelivery the ultimate lifestlye experience you deserve through cleaning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer (Male)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a reliable, organized, and hands-on Admin officer to support the smooth daily operations of our organisation.
	The ideal candidate must have strong administrative skills, must be hands on, has the ability to drive and pay excellent attention to details.


Key Responsibilities


	Work with the Admin team to oversee general administrative duties to ensure efficient office operations.
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and facility maintenance needs.
	Handle documentation, filing and record keeping.
	Support staff and management with logistics.
	Maintain a clean and organised office environment.
	Provide general support to all departments as needed.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 Years of Experience in an Admin Officer role.
	Must live in Lagos (Preferably on the Mainland)
	Must be able to drive and possess a valid driver&#39;s license.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency with basic computer tools (Microsoft Office, google workspace)
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.


Work Hours


	Mondays - Fridays and occasionally on Saturdays
	8am-6pm


Salary
N150,000 / month

Other Benefits:


	Meal Allowance
	HMO
	Pension
	Leave Allowance


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cleantalents@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Admin Officer (Male) Job at Clean Ace Dry Cleaners and Launderers Limited




        
    

        
        Clean Ace Dry  Cleaners and Launderers Limited is a certified Dry cleaning company, with mission ofdelivery the ultimate lifestlye experience you deserve through cleaning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer (Male)

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a reliable, organized, and hands-on Admin officer to support the smooth daily operations of our organisation.
	The ideal candidate must have strong administrative skills, must be hands on, has the ability to drive and pay excellent attention to details.


Key Responsibilities


	Work with the Admin team to oversee general administrative duties to ensure efficient office operations.
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and facility maintenance needs.
	Handle documentation, filing and record keeping.
	Support staff and management with logistics.
	Maintain a clean and organised office environment.
	Provide general support to all departments as needed.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 Years of Experience in an Admin Officer role.
	Must live in Lagos (Preferably on the Mainland)
	Must be able to drive and possess a valid driver's license.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Proficiency with basic computer tools (Microsoft Office, google workspace)
	Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.


Work Hours


	Mondays - Fridays and occasionally on Saturdays
	8am-6pm


Salary
N150,000 / month

Other Benefits:


	Meal Allowance
	HMO
	Pension
	Leave Allowance


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Service Representative Job at Reverse Aesthetics Limited




        
    

        
        Reverse Aesthetics is a premium aesthetic and medical spa based in Victoria Island, Lagos, founded by a renowned and experienced aesthetic physician. The clinic specializes in safe, natural-looking aesthetic enhancements, advanced skin treatments, and non-surgical facial rejuvenation tailored to each client.

Driven by a philosophy of safety, expertise, and subtle excellence, Reverse Aesthetics is known for undetectable results that enhance confidence without altering identity. With a growing footprint across Nigeria, the brand is committed to setting the standard for world-class aesthetic care in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire a Customer Service Representative (Sales & Conversion) to manage client inquiries, convert leads into bookings, and ensure a seamless and professional client experience.


Responsibilities


	Respond promptly to inquiries via WhatsApp, Instagram, phone, and other platforms
	Convert inquiries in Job Summary to confirmed bookings and drive revenue
	Follow up consistently on pending leads
	Provide accurate information on treatments, pricing, and policies
	Maintain proper booking records and update CRM systems
	Upsell and cross-sell services where appropriate
	Escalate medical or technical questions to the appropriate team


Requirements


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven mindset with ability to convert leads
	Professional, polite, and customer-focused attitude
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple conversations
	Previous experience in customer service or sales is an added advantage.


Remuneration


	?150,000 monthly gross salary
	Performance-based growth opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to:  [email protected] using “Customer Service Representative Application” as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Sales Executive",
  "description": "Syinix is a leading home appliance and consumer electronics brand with a strong presence across Africa, offering products such as TVs, refrigerators, air conditioners, and kitchen appliances.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Senior Sales Executive will be responsible for driving sales growth, expanding market share, and managing key customer relationships within Lagos and surrounding regions.
	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in selling electronics or home appliances and a proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of Syinix products including TVs, home appliances, and related electronics
	Identify and develop new business opportunities (retail, distributors, and corporate clients)
	Manage and grow relationships with key distributors, dealers, and retail partners
	Achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets
	Conduct market visits, product demonstrations, and promotional activities
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing, and market trends
	Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and pipeline updates
	Ensure excellent customer experience and after-sales follow-up
	Collaborate with marketing and technical teams to execute campaigns and product launches.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field
	Minimum of 4 years of sales experience in:
	
		Consumer electronics
		Home appliances
		FMCG or similar related industries
	
	
	Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Good understanding of the Lagos market and distribution channels
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple accounts
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and Cover letter to:&nbsp;adebayo.deborah@transsion.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Senior Sales Executive Job at Syinix




        
    

        
        Syinix is a leading home appliance and consumer electronics brand with a strong presence across Africa, offering products such as TVs, refrigerators, air conditioners, and kitchen appliances.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Senior Sales Executive will be responsible for driving sales growth, expanding market share, and managing key customer relationships within Lagos and surrounding regions.
	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in selling electronics or home appliances and a proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales of Syinix products including TVs, home appliances, and related electronics
	Identify and develop new business opportunities (retail, distributors, and corporate clients)
	Manage and grow relationships with key distributors, dealers, and retail partners
	Achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets
	Conduct market visits, product demonstrations, and promotional activities
	Monitor competitor activities, pricing, and market trends
	Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and pipeline updates
	Ensure excellent customer experience and after-sales follow-up
	Collaborate with marketing and technical teams to execute campaigns and product launches.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field
	Minimum of 4 years of sales experience in:
	
		Consumer electronics
		Home appliances
		FMCG or similar related industries
	
	
	Proven track record of achieving or exceeding sales targets
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Good understanding of the Lagos market and distribution channels
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple accounts
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Excel, PowerPoint, etc.).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and Cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant (Entry Level)",
  "description": "High Caliber Nigeria Limited is a Nigerian human resources and management consulting firm that provides workforce solutions to organizations across different industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant (Entry Level)

Job Location:&nbsp;Alimosho (Akowonjo), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accountant (Entry-level) to join our finance team.
	The successful candidate will assist in managing financial records, preparing financial statements, and ensuring compliance with Nigerian accounting standards and regulations.


Responsibilities


	Assist in preparing financial reports, budgets, and forecasts
	Support the reconciliation of financial statements, bank accounts, and ledgers
	Process invoices, payments, and expense reports accurately and timely
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Assist in cost control, expense tracking, and financial performance monitoring


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	0-2 years of experience in finance, accounting, or a similar role (internships included)
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, including Excel, PowerPoint, and Word
	Familiarity with Nigerian accounting standards and regulations


Preferred:


	Experience with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAP, or similar)
	Certification or progress toward a professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, CFA) is an advantage


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs, and cover letters to:&nbsp;tijani.tmh@gmail.com&nbsp;using &#39;Accountant (Entry Level)&#39; as the subject of the email.",

Accountant (Entry Level) Job at High Caliber Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        High Caliber Nigeria Limited is a Nigerian human resources and management consulting firm that provides workforce solutions to organizations across different industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant (Entry Level)

Job Location: Alimosho (Akowonjo), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accountant (Entry-level) to join our finance team.
	The successful candidate will assist in managing financial records, preparing financial statements, and ensuring compliance with Nigerian accounting standards and regulations.


Responsibilities


	Assist in preparing financial reports, budgets, and forecasts
	Support the reconciliation of financial statements, bank accounts, and ledgers
	Process invoices, payments, and expense reports accurately and timely
	Ensure compliance with financial policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Assist in cost control, expense tracking, and financial performance monitoring


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	0-2 years of experience in finance, accounting, or a similar role (internships included)
	Strong numerical and analytical skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, including Excel, PowerPoint, and Word
	Familiarity with Nigerian accounting standards and regulations


Preferred:


	Experience with accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAP, or similar)
	Certification or progress toward a professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, CFA) is an advantage


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs, and cover letters to: [email protected] using 'Accountant (Entry Level)' as the subject of the email.
